name: Minerva Orland
alt_names: ミネルバ・オーランド
description: __Race:__ Human    __Affiliation:__ Sabertooth  __Occupation:__ Mage  __Team:__ Team Sabertooth  __Base of Operations:__ Sabertooth Guild  __Relative:__ Jiemma (Father)  Minerva is a Mage of the currently strongest Guild in Fiore, Sabertooth. She speaks in highly formal language. Befitting her formal speech, she is also very mature and wishes that the people around act accordingly. Minerva speaks in an archaic, old form of Japanese.  (Source: Fairy Tail Wikia)
